heroSection.title: Growing Resilient Cities
heroSection.subtitle: Muuras fosters bio-based solutions that support sustainable urban ecosystems.
heroSection.cardText: We are eager to spread our Wetland Wall technology to new places, or to help you realize your own bio-based technology - let’s grow greener cities together!
resilienceSection.title: Restoring Natural Resilience:
resilienceSection.text: Resilient cities are the future of urban living. Resilient cities keep humans safe, sheltered, and healthy in the face of extreme weather, pollution, and climate change. Muuras collaborates with nature to fulfil its mission: restoring the resilience of cities to safeguard life itself.
